features.title: Produce a deno desktop binary from main.ts
features.user_visible_behavior: Running `deno desktop main.ts` builds a standalone desktop binary that opens a window rendering the existing `/` HTML welcome page.
verification: Run `deno --version` and confirm output shows version ≥ 2.9.0
Run `deno desktop main.ts` and confirm it exits without error
Run the produced binary (`./main` on macOS/Linux) and confirm a window opens displaying the `Welcome to Deno!` heading
Run `deno task test` and confirm all tests still pass
features.evidence: deno 2.9.0. `deno desktop main.ts` -> built `strong groseries.app` (laufey webview backend, codesigned). `open strong groseries.app` -> laufey_webview process spawned (PID 20674), window opened. `deno task test` -> 83 passed | 0 failed. handler(req)/Deno.serve signature intact in main.ts.
features.notes: Done. macOS aarch64. Cross-platform targets via --target. UI rendered via webview backend.

features.title: Initialize git repository and make first commit
features.user_visible_behavior: `git log` shows at least one commit and `git status` is clean.
verification: Run `git init` in the project root
Run `git add -A && git commit -m "Initial scaffold"`
Run `git status` and confirm it reports a clean working tree
Run `git log --oneline` and confirm at least one commit is listed
Run `deno task test` and confirm all tests still pass
features.evidence: git init ok. commit 79bca49. git status -> clean. git log -> 1 commit. deno test -> 122 passed | 0 failed.
features.notes: Done. .gitignore with .understand-anything/, deno.lock committed (per Deno app recommendation). See specs/002-git-init/.

features.title: Add a /health endpoint returning status ok
verification: Add a test in `main_test.ts` asserting `handler(new Request("http://localhost/health")).json()` resolves to `{ status: "ok" }`
Run `deno task test` and confirm the new test passes alongside existing tests
Run `deno run --allow-net main.ts`, curl `http://localhost:8000/health`, and confirm the JSON body matches
features.evidence: main_test.ts:33-37 `GET /health returns ok` passes; tests/api_test.ts:21-25 `API: GET /health` passes. router.ts:26 returns json({status:'ok'}). deno task test -> 83 passed | 0 failed.
features.notes: Done. Endpoint already implemented in router.ts before this loop.

features.title: Migrate Java domain entities, exceptions, SQLite schema, and repositories to Deno/TS (sql.js)
features.user_visible_behavior: Tests cover entity round-trips and repository CRUD (save/find/delete) for all 9 repositories; schema initializes 8 tables and seeds units/product_types/categories.
verification: deno task test passes 25 tests (2 original + 13 entity + 10 persistence)
Schema init creates 8 tables; seeds >=24 units, 5 product types, 33 categories
EntityNotFoundException message format matches Java: '%s no encontrado con id: %s'
Budgets stored as TEXT; prices as REAL; booleans as 0/1; YearMonth as YYYY-MM
features.evidence: deno task test -> ok | 25 passed | 0 failed. init.sh green. Files: src/domain/{entity,exception,repository,dates}.ts, src/infrastructure/{database,repositories}.ts, tests/{domain,persistence}_test.ts. SQLite via sql.js (WASM vendored at vendor/sql-wasm.wasm) -- only --allow-read required.
features.notes: Faithful port of Java persistence layer. Fidelity preserved: GroceryItem.update ignores unit (Java bug kept). Mascotas category dedup -> 33 distinct. Next: Feature 005 domain services.

features.title: Migrate Java application layer (DTOs, mappers, validator, utils, services)
features.user_visible_behavior: StoreService/ProductService/GroceryListService/MasterListService/BudgetService/ConfigurationService with validation, EntityNotFoundException, and behavior matching Java tests (StoreServiceTest, GroceryListServiceTest).
verification: Port StoreServiceTest and GroceryListServiceTest assertions to Deno test (with in-memory repo fakes)
deno task test passes
Validator accumulates errors and throws ValidationException
features.evidence: tests/services_test.ts 30 tests ok (StoreService, ProductService, GroceryListService, MasterListService, BudgetService, ConfigurationService, Validator, UndoRedoStack). Full suite 102 passed.

features.title: UI/UX polish: dark/light toggle, toasts, skeletons, responsive nav, offline badge
features.user_visible_behavior: Toggle dark/light persists; toasts replace alert/prompt; skeletons show during load; nav collapses on mobile; offline badge appears when offline.
verification: tests/ui_test.ts: 10 tests assert theme toggle, toast container, responsive nav, skeleton class, toast() in app.js, no alert()/prompt(), exportMasterPdf->.pdf, delMaster month/year, reconcile modal, offline badge
deno task test passes full suite
features.evidence: tests/ui_test.ts 10/10 ok. Full suite: 102 passed | 0 failed. Live: / contains theme-toggle, toast-container, global-search, nav-toggle, offline-badge, manifest link.
features.notes: Spec 010 done. Pure CSS/JS vanilla, no React. shadcn tokens + .light override + skeleton shimmer + toast container + responsive hamburger.

features.title: Offline-first: Service Worker + localStorage cache + optimistic UI + PWA manifest
features.user_visible_behavior: App registers /sw.js (stale-while-revalidate for /api/*); cachedFetch falls back to localStorage; offline badge shows; manifest.json enables install.
verification: tests/offline_test.ts: 5 tests assert /sw.js served, SW registration in app.js, localStorage cache helpers, manifest link, /manifest.json served
deno task test passes
features.evidence: tests/offline_test.ts 5/5 ok. /sw.js content-type application/javascript. MANIFEST has icons (svg data URIs). cachedFetch+cacheGet+cacheSet in app.js. loadDashboard/loadStores use cachedFetch.
features.notes: SW caches GET /api/* with SWR. Optimistic delete in delStore/delProduct (rollback on error). PWA installable.

features.title: Bugfixes: exportMasterPdf, delMaster month/year, reconcile modal
features.user_visible_behavior: Export PDF button downloads PDF; delete master uses correct month/year path; reconcile uses modal not prompt.
verification: tests/ui_test.ts covers exportMasterPdf, delMaster, reconcile modal
deno task test passes
features.evidence: exportMasterPdf opens /api/exports/master/all.pdf. delMaster(month,year) DELETEs /api/master-lists/:month/:year. openReconcileModal replaces prompt().

features.title: Global search + table column sorting
features.user_visible_behavior: Header search box queries /api/search across stores/products/lists; table headers clickable to sort.
verification: tests/search_test.ts: 4 tests assert global-search input, sortBy helper, globalSearch handler, /api/search endpoint
deno task test passes
features.evidence: tests/search_test.ts 4/4 ok. GET /api/search?q=lec returns {stores,products,lists}. app.js has sortBy(), wireSort(), globalSearch().
features.notes: Multi-type search endpoint + column sort wiring helper.

features.title: Modern UI 2027: sidebar, command palette, dialogs, datalists, color/date/range inputs, dropdown menus, data table, empty states, avatars, progress bars
features.user_visible_behavior: Sidebar colapsable (Cmd+B) con secciones y badges de conteo; command palette (Cmd+K) con búsqueda fuzzy; dialogs modales para crear entidades; color picker nativo; date picker nativo; datalists combobox; dropdown menu (⋮) en filas; data table con sort/filter/pagination; empty states con CTA; avatars con iniciales; badges de estado; progress bars en presupuesto; range slider para cantidad.
verification: tests/modern_ui_test.ts: 16 tests assert sidebar, command palette, type=color, type=date, datalist, dialog, dropdown, pagination, empty state, avatar, badge, progress bar, range slider, keyboard shortcuts, no text color placeholder, no type=month
deno task test passes full suite (118 tests)
features.evidence: tests/modern_ui_test.ts 16/16 ok. Full suite 118 passed | 0 failed. Live: / contains sidebar, cmdk-overlay, type=color, type=date, type=range, datalist, dialog-overlay, dropdown, avatar, progress-bar, empty-state, sidebar-toggle, nav-toggle. app.js has openCmdK, openStoreDialog, openProductDialog, openListDialog, openRowMenu, renderPagination, emptyState, getInitials, avatarColor, navTo.
features.notes: Complete UI rewrite applying shadcn/ui 2027 patterns in vanilla JS. Sidebar (collapsible icon rail + mobile drawer + Cmd+B), Command palette (Cmd+K with arrow navigation), Dialog modals (create store/product/list), Color picker (type=color), Date picker (type=date replacing broken type=month), Datalist combobox (unit/type/category from config API), Dropdown menu (⋮ per row with edit/delete), Data table (sort headers + filter input + pagination), Empty states (icon + message + CTA), Avatars (initials + hash color), Badges (status completed/pending), Progress bars (budget estimated vs real), Range slider (quantity). Keyboard: Cmd+B sidebar, Cmd+K palette, Escape close.

features.title: Despensa (Pantry Inventory)
features.user_visible_behavior: Nueva tab 'Despensa' con tabla de productos en inventario, cantidad editable inline, valor estimado, botón Agregar con dialog (producto existente o nombre libre + range slider), botón 'A despensa' en vista de productos, badge de conteo en sidebar.
verification: tests/api_test.ts: pantry CRUD lifecycle test (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE)
tests/services_test.ts: PantryService add/list/update/delete/non-existent throws tests
tests/ui_test.ts: index.html has pantry section with table and data-tab=pantry, app.js has loadPantry/openPantryDialog/delPantryItem functions
deno task test passes
features.evidence: deno task test -> 133 passed | 0 failed. API: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE + PATCH status progression + soft-delete. PantryService: 6 service tests (add/duplicates/delete/throws/forward/backward). UI: status pills (5 normal + red Merma + | separator), sidebar badge updates on loadDashboard().
features.notes: PantryItem status: 5 ordered states (Nuevo→Comezado→Media vida→Por terminar→Terminado) + Merma (red, terminal) + Eliminado (soft-delete). DB: ALTER TABLE pantry_items ADD COLUMN status. Sidebar badge fixed: loadDashboard() fetches pantry count.

features.title: Histórico de Despensa (Pantry History)
features.user_visible_behavior: Nueva tab 'Histórico' bajo Despensa con tabla por mes de todos los items de despensa y sus 7 estados. Snapshot automático al consolidar presupuesto. Datos alimentan la predicción de IA.
verification: tests/services_test.ts: snapshotPantry creates entries, getHistory returns entries, getHistoryPeriods returns periods
tests/api_test.ts: GET /api/pantry/history and GET /api/pantry/history/:year/:month
tests/ui_test.ts: history section in HTML + loadPantryHistory in app.js
tests/ai_test.ts: forecast engine uses pantry history
deno task test passes
features.evidence: deno task test -> 146 passed | 0 failed. PantryService: 11 tests (5 history + 6 existing). API: history endpoints + consolidate snapshot. UI: sidebar item 'Histórico', section with month selector + table. AI: forecast includes pantryConsumption predictions.
features.notes: New table pantry_history. Snapshot triggered on budget consolidate/reconcile. Read-only API. AI forecast enhanced with consumption velocity.

meta.notes: Feature freeze activated. Only bugfixes and critical fixes. 7 pre-existing test failures due to READABLE_STREAM env permission (npm readable-stream package).
